message:
feat(search): implement hybrid search pipeline with daemon-based model serving

Semantic search pipeline:
- embedder.rs (+110 lines): text embedding trait supporting static
  hash and transformer model backends with configurable dimensionality
- model_registry.rs (+24 lines): registry mapping model names to
  backends (MiniLM, BGE, Nomic, FNV1a hash) with feature negotiation
- reranker.rs (+92 lines): cross-encoder reranking trait with error
  types and frankensearch adapter for multi-stage retrieval
- hybrid.rs (+142 lines): Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF) combining
  lexical BM25 and semantic vector search for improved relevance
  without sacrificing recall

Daemon infrastructure:
- daemon/core.rs (+28 lines): Unix Domain Socket listener with
  request handling and model lifecycle management for warm model serving
- daemon/worker.rs (+97 lines): background embedding worker with job
  submission, cancellation, and progress tracking via channels
- daemon/client.rs (+16 lines): daemon client communication updates
  for MessagePack-based IPC protocol

Configuration and initialization:
- config.rs (+47 lines): layered configuration system supporting TOML
  files, environment variables, and CLI argument overrides
- main.rs (+51 lines): updated CLI initialization and argument parsing
  to wire new config system
- storage.rs (+20/-23): SQLite schema updates for embedding job
  tracking and retrieval index persistence
- Cargo.toml (+7/-7): add rmp-serde dependency for MessagePack
  serialization in daemon protocol

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -60,6 +60,10 @@ rusqlite = { version = "0.32", features = ["bundled", "modern_sqlite"] }
 # Full-text search
 tantivy = "0.22"
 
+# frankensearch migration surfaces (bd-3un.35)
+frankensearch-core = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git", package = "frankensearch-core", optional = true }
+frankensearch-fusion = { git = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/frankensearch.git", package = "frankensearch-fusion", optional = true }
+
 # High-performance text processing
 regex = "1.10"
 memchr = "2.7"
@@ -131,6 +135,9 @@ legacy-colors = []
 parallel-search = []
 alloc-count = []
 
+# Opt-in migration bridge to frankensearch fusion primitives.
+frankensearch-migration = ["dep:frankensearch-core", "dep:frankensearch-fusion"]
+
 [[bench]]
 name = "search_perf"
 harness = false
